meaning: n.焦油,柏油;[计]一种压缩文件的扩展名
examples: The oil has hardened to tar.
Another discovered a valuable diamond brooch covered in tar in a bathroom stall.
He was attempting to manufacture quinine from aniline, an inexpensive and readily available coal tar waste product.
Florida Atlantic would seem to be most capable of giving the Tar Heels a tough test.
Over the past year or so, opposition to new tar-sands projects has been steadily growing.
